{{Missing Info|specifics=form, element, realm, second HARD}}

{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Due to its unique body composition, the Alchemy Doll was not destroyed after falling into the Alchemy Furnace, but left behind this marvelous elixir to accompany those who follow!
|affct=CIV
|hard=HP
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=Unknown
|relic1=The Blood of Nessus
|relic2=Arabian Bronze Hand
|relic3=Royal Purple Heart
|relic4=Mouth Of Truth
|relic5=Flask of Life
}}
|color=green
|earth=1
|water=2
|fire=2
|wind=1
|form=
|element=
|realm=
|orangehard=
}}
